_note: v3.0 asset-first registry: .kdna files are canonical KDNA v1.0 assets. Use asset_url, media_type, and asset_digest; kdna_url, sha256, kdna_spec, and language are invalid fields.

governance.yank_policy: Domains with severe safety issues may be yanked. Yanked domains are blocked from new installations. See registry-policy.md.
governance.appeal_process: Authors may appeal moderation decisions by opening an issue with evidence.

@aikdna.description: Official KDNA domains maintained by the KDNA Team.

domains.name: @aikdna/decision_state

zh-CN.description: 判断一次会议或讨论是否产生了可执行的决策——而不只是讨论。
zh-CN.core_insight: 讨论不是决策。广泛共识不是承诺。

domains.description: Judge whether a meeting or discussion produced an actionable decision — or just discussion.
domains.core_insight: Discussion is not decision. Broad agreement is not commitment.
domains.yanked_reason: Not part of the official reference set; retained in the registry only as experimental source for future review.

authoring.note: Signed legacy asset awaiting Studio-compatible republish. Lacks Studio compiler provenance, build_id, and content_digest from Studio pipeline. quality_badge reflects eval-based testing, not Studio provenance.

domains.name: @aikdna/agent_safety

zh-CN.description: 在执行不可逆操作前暂停——验证授权、备份和可逆性。
zh-CN.core_insight: 工具让Agent有能力。安全判断让Agent在不可逆操作前保持谨慎。

domains.description: Halt before irreversible actions — verify authorization, backup, and reversibility.
domains.core_insight: Tools make agents capable. Safety judgment makes agents cautious before irreversible action.

publish_audit.commit_note: Republished with Studio provenance via kdna-studio create --from-kdna → approve → lock → export

domains.name: @aikdna/writing

zh-CN.description: 诊断内容是否有真实观点、认知钩子和证据密度，而不是只做文字润色。
zh-CN.core_insight: 大多数写作问题不是语言问题，而是结构和观点层面的问题。

domains.description: Diagnose whether content has a real argument, a cognitive hook, and evidence density — not just language polish.
domains.core_insight: Most writing problems are structural and argument-level, not language-level.

publish_audit.commit_note: Republished with Studio provenance via kdna-studio create --from-kdna → approve → lock → export

domains.name: @aikdna/content_strategy

zh-CN.description: 评估选题价值——特定受众、认知差异、可讨论性和理解门槛。
zh-CN.core_insight: 想法很廉价。真正稀缺的是值得被讨论的话题。

domains.description: Evaluate topic worthiness — specific audience, cognitive contrast, discussability, and comprehension barrier.
domains.core_insight: Ideas are cheap. Worthiness is rare. Filter topics by who they are for and what assumption they challenge.
domains.yanked_reason: Not part of the official reference set; retained in the registry only as experimental source for future review.

authoring.note: Signed legacy asset awaiting Studio-compatible republish. Lacks Studio compiler provenance, build_id, and content_digest from Studio pipeline. quality_badge reflects eval-based testing, not Studio provenance.

domains.name: @aikdna/prompt_diagnosis

zh-CN.description: 诊断提示失败的根本原因——通常是任务混合、目标模糊或上下文缺口，而非格式问题。
zh-CN.core_insight: 大多数提示失败是任务混合和目标模糊，而非缺少格式元素。

domains.description: Diagnose why a prompt failed — root cause is task mixing, goal ambiguity, or context gap — not just format issues.
domains.core_insight: Most prompt failures are task mixing and goal ambiguity, not missing format elements.

publish_audit.commit_note: Republished with Studio provenance via kdna-studio create --from-kdna → approve → lock → export

domains.name: @aikdna/knowledge_management

zh-CN.description: 区分知识资产和原始材料——知识需要有命题、边界、反例和演进记录。
zh-CN.core_insight: 大多数知识库只是原始材料集合。知识需要检验，而非仅仅保存。

domains.description: Distinguish knowledge assets from raw material — knowledge needs proposition, boundary, counter-example, and evolution record.
domains.core_insight: Most 'knowledge bases' are raw material collections. Knowledge requires testing, not just saving.
domains.yanked_reason: Not part of the official reference set; retained in the registry only as experimental source for future review.

authoring.note: Signed legacy asset awaiting Studio-compatible republish. Lacks Studio compiler provenance, build_id, and content_digest from Studio pipeline. quality_badge reflects eval-based testing, not Studio provenance.

domains.name: @aikdna/kdna_authoring

zh-CN.description: 元认知——教 Agent 如何通过访谈优先的创作方式和质量审核来编写高质量 KDNA。
zh-CN.core_insight: KDNA编码的是判断，不是信息。通过访谈提取的专家区分点是唯一有效的原始素材。

domains.description: Meta-cognition — teach agents how to author high-quality KDNA through interview-first authoring and quality auditing.
domains.core_insight: KDNA encodes judgment, not information. Expert distinctions extracted through interview are the only valid raw material.

publish_audit.commit_note: Republished with Studio provenance via kdna-studio create --from-kdna → approve → lock → export

domains.name: @aikdna/open_source_project

zh-CN.description: 诊断项目为什么没有获得采纳——根本原因是价值入口清晰度，而非文档或功能缺口。
zh-CN.core_insight: 采纳失败是价值入口问题：访客在30秒内无法确定问题和替代方案。

domains.description: Diagnose why a project isn't gaining adoption — root cause is value-entry clarity, not documentation or feature gaps.
domains.core_insight: Adoption failure is a value-entry problem: visitors cannot determine the problem and alternative in 30 seconds.
domains.yanked_reason: Not part of the official reference set; retained in the registry only as experimental source for future review.

authoring.note: Signed legacy asset awaiting Studio-compatible republish. Lacks Studio compiler provenance, build_id, and content_digest from Studio pipeline. quality_badge reflects eval-based testing, not Studio provenance.

domains.name: @aikdna/animation
domains.description: World-class animation judgment cluster: seven domains teaching agents what quality means, what to reject, and when to choose restraint — before they write a line of code. Clusters provide discovery and composition rules, not direct downloads — individual sub-domains are downloadable separately.
domains.core_insight: Animation is not an API problem. It is an attention, timing, restraint, performance, and taste judgment problem.
domains.yanked_reason: Discovery-only animation cluster; not part of the official reference set.

domains.name: @aikdna/motion_design_master
domains.description: Motion design master domain — taste, timing, restraint judgment for UI animation.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: Animation is not an API problem. It is an attention, timing, restraint, performance, and taste judgment problem.

domains.name: @aikdna/gsap_master
domains.description: GSAP mastery — ScrollTrigger, timeline, tween, stagger judgment.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: GSAP mastery requires understanding timeline orchestration, not just tween syntax.

domains.name: @aikdna/motion_canvas_master
domains.description: Motion Canvas mastery — programmatic video, scene composition, explainer animation judgment.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: Programmatic video animation demands scene composition judgment beyond code execution.

domains.name: @aikdna/web_animation_performance
domains.description: Web animation performance — jank diagnosis, frame rate, GPU composition judgment.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: Jank is not a rendering bug. It is a judgment failure about when and what to animate.

domains.name: @aikdna/frontend_motion_system
domains.description: Frontend motion system — design tokens, motion primitives, system-level consistency judgment.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: Motion systems require design token consistency, not one-off animation code.

domains.name: @aikdna/ai_animation_workflow
domains.description: AI animation workflow — agent-generated animation quality judgment.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: AI-generated animation needs quality gates, not just generation speed.

domains.name: @aikdna/animation_review_master
domains.description: Animation review master — critique, diagnosis, quality assessment judgment.
domains.yanked_reason: Experimental animation cluster member; not official-installable until evals, Human Lock, and consolidation review are complete.
domains.core_insight: Animation review is critique, not approval. Every note must reference a timing or attention principle.

domains.name: @aikdna/code_review

zh-CN.description: 行为优先审查、评论分类和反橡皮图章原则。
zh-CN.core_insight: 每条要求修改的审查意见必须引用具体的失败模式。

domains.description: Reference domain for code review judgment — behavior-first review, comment classification, and anti-rubber-stamp principles.
domains.core_insight: Every review comment that requests a change must cite a specific failure mode.

publish_audit.commit_note: Republished with Studio provenance via kdna-studio create --from-kdna → approve → lock → export
